items.name_cn:
🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Golden Vintage
▪ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's explodingly popular shoulder bag is finally here from Y!! Model: 713938 [Original Leather]
Size: 22x22x10cm

items.name_en: 🌸 [No packaging for this size] 🌈 Y Brand continues its minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining beauty and practicality, very roomy. The lambskin surface is soft and smooth with a premium texture! Comes with a detachable pouch, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions, full of three-dimensional feel! Perfectly interprets low-key minimalism 👍

items.name_cn:
🌸 [No packaging for this size] Suede_
Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo
Many girls want a big bag for autumn and winter, and this Bea is perfect. The leather texture is great from the inside out. There are two leather straps inside the bag; when tied, it becomes a Hobo. The capacity is very sufficient, a 13-inch MacBook fits!
With a soft body, the bag forms a natural indentation, giving a relaxed and effortless feel, making you look casual and free-spirited!
Model: 763435
Size: 50×28×18cm

items.name_cn:
🌸 【No packaging for this size】Black/Antique Gold
The new BEA tote version in a horizontal style. It features a leather buckle closure and is embellished with LE CASSANDRE. It offers ample space with a matching suede lining, a main compartment, and an internal zip pocket. The internal drawstring design allows the sides to be folded or expanded as needed. The soft doe-skin BEA texture offers a rare, luxurious feel. The simple appearance combined with this softness creates a lazy, effortless look when worn. The sides can also be contracted, giving it two different forms 👑
Model: 763435 [White Gold Buckle]
Size: 50x28x18cm

items.name_en: 🌸 CALYPSO_ Elephant Grain Lambskin Chain Bag
items.name_cn:
🌸 CALYPSO_ Elephant Grain Lambskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian lambskin, the texture is soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use.
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153

items.name_cn:
🌸 ICARE Straw Bag
. YSL's new ICARE straw collection is undoubtedly the most anticipated item for this spring and summer! The straw design💐 is unique, like a gift from nature, full of vitality. Its colors are like a spring palette🎨, rich and vivid, making you happy at first glance~ Back to the bag itself: an enlarged LOGO, fully handmade, the full hand-crochet texture is amazing! It also comes with a detachable eyeglass case, perfect for spring and summer trips🏖️
 Model: 772191.
 Dimensions: 37-55x43x5cm.
 Eyeglass case dimensions: 21.7x16.9x2cm

items.name_en: 🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
items.name_cn:
🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
If you want something stylish, simple, and fail-safe, this Solferino is the perfect choice~ As the smallest member of the family, its size is just right to easily fit any size of phone, making it an ideal on-the-go essential. Love it!! Both the look and versatility are on point. Buy it!
And you can happily style it with a full leather look! This attention to detail is spot on for the current casual trend. Highly recommended~
Model: 753963
Dimensions: 18×11×5cm

items.name_cn:
🎐SOLFERINO BOX 🎐
「Newest Autumn/Winter Color」
2020 IT BAG_ Must-have hot model, conquered the entire fashion world before it even launched! Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin, excellent texture and flexibility! Inner design features three-layer accordion pockets, easily accommodating daily essentials. New "L" letter top and bottom half-open clasp, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, it's so interesting!
Model: 634306.Zx Size: 19x13x5cm
